pages.text: The $(item)Poultry Skyseed$() — a $(item)Feather$() and an $(item)Egg$() over two dirt. A walled coop of chickens.$(br2)$(bold)Where to look$()$(br)Chickens roam grassy isles; a feather or a dropped egg is enough to start the coop.
Everything's in hand — here's how it goes together.
A little roofed coop — chickens jump fences, so this one is walled in. A small flock of $(bold)chickens$() comes with it, plus a composter for the seeds-and-eggs loop.

$(bold)Eggs and feathers$()$(br)Made from a $(item)Feather$() and an $(item)Egg$() off a wandering chicken, plus dirt. Eggs throw into more chickens; feathers make arrows. The cheapest animal island, and a fine first one.
